title: Pan-Seared Pork Chops with Italian Gratin
description: Tender pork chops seared to perfection, served with a creamy Italian-inspired gratin.
instructions: Season pork chops with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear pork chops for 2-3 minutes per side, or until browned.
Transfer skillet to preheated oven and bake for 12-15 minutes, or until cooked through.
While pork chops are cooking, prepare gratin.
In a separate saucepan, melt butter over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute, or until fragrant.
Pour in heavy cream and bring to a simmer.
Reduce cream by half, stirring constantly.
Stir in Parmesan and Italian seasoning.
Transfer gratin to a serving dish and top with seared pork chops.
Garnish with parsley and serve immediately.
